summary: Canonical RM Selection Flow Correction - Backend tests 100% passed (15/15). Frontend code review verified all wording changes are correct. Backend APIs for RM availability, validation, and lead creation with selection metadata all working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Venue detail page URL redirects to homepage when navigating directly - may be a routing issue or SSR/hydration issue

action_items: Investigate venue page routing issue - direct navigation to /venue/delhi/the-leela-palace-new-delhi redirects to homepage
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: GET /api/rms/available correctly returns {rms: [...], checked_at: ...} with availability field per RM
Backend: GET /api/rms/available correctly filters out RMs at capacity (>= 25 active leads)
Backend: POST /api/rms/validate-selection correctly returns {available: true/false, rm_id, rm_name, active_leads}
Backend: POST /api/leads correctly stores rm_selection_mode, rm_candidates_shown, rm_selection_timestamp, rm_availability_checked_at
Backend: POST /api/leads returns 409 if selected RM is at capacity
Frontend: EnquiryForm.js line 496 - Step labels are ['Availability', 'Choose RM', 'Verify'] - CORRECT
Frontend: EnquiryForm.js line 397 - Intro heading says 'Choose Your Personal RM' - CORRECT
Frontend: EnquiryForm.js line 535 - Assigning view says 'Checking RM Availability' - CORRECT

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - UI testing limited due to venue page routing issue

seed_data_creation: Created test leads with TEST_ prefix for RM selection testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: RM Selection Flow backend APIs all working. Frontend code verified via code review - all wording changes from 'Assigning' to 'Checking RM Availability' are correct. Venue page direct navigation has a routing issue that may need investigation.

features_verified.GET /api/rms/available: PASS - Returns {rms: [...], checked_at: ...} with availability field per RM
features_verified.GET /api/rms/available filters capacity: PASS - Filters out RMs at capacity (>= 25 active leads)
features_verified.POST /api/rms/validate-selection valid: PASS - Returns {available: true, rm_id, rm_name, active_leads}
features_verified.POST /api/rms/validate-selection invalid: PASS - Returns {available: false} for invalid rm_id
features_verified.Frontend intro heading: PASS (code review) - Says 'Choose Your Personal RM'
